text:
HEllo,

On Wed, Aug 28, 2013 at 09:47:14AM -0600, Brad Davis wrote:
> 
> Can you tell me what you have changed from my patch.

Mainly there are modifications of Makefile according to collectd port (I
mean options groups). Also I've divided notify email and notify desktop.
Other things was left.

Grettings
